channel.title: DevTools
channel.description:
This feature depends on the Frontity Hooks one so I'll update it once we start working on that.
## User Stories
>As a **Frontity developer** >I want to **see the history of state mutations** >so that I can **debug my app**.
>As a **Frontity developer** >I want to **see the action executions** >so that I can **debug my app**.
>As a **Frontity developer** >I want to **see what components are subscribe to what parts of the state** >so that I **can debug my app**.

item.title: DevTools
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
I think we should inspire in the Overmind devtools: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j_dzXucq3E4

Read full topic

item.title: DevTools
item.dc:creator: luisherranz
item.description:
This feature depends on the Frontity Hooks one so I’ll update it once we start working on that.

User Stories

As a Frontity developer
I want to see the history of state mutations
so that I can debug my app.

As a Frontity developer
I want to see the action executions
so that I can debug my app.

As a Frontity developer
I want to see what components are subscribe to what parts of the state
so that I can debug my app.

Read full topic
